title: carlina vulgaris subsp. stricta
intro: Carlina vulgaris subsp. stricta, also known as strict carline thistle, is a subspecies of the Carlina vulgaris plant, a biennial herb that belongs to the sunflower family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Carlina vulgaris subsp. stricta include its ability to relieve digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Carlina vulgaris subsp. stricta can be found in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
